name: Mediterranean Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the skin from the chicken.
2. Combine all remaining ingredients except butter in a bowl.
3. Dip each piece of chicken into the melted butter, then coat evenly with the crumb mixture.
4. Place the chicken pieces in a large, shallow baking dish so that they do not touch one another.
5. Bake at a moderate temperature (350 degrees Fahrenheit) until the chicken is tender, approximately 1 hour.
6. Garnish with parsley before serving.
